correction: Each conservation permit row is one permit per year for 2025, 2026, and 2027; do not divide by 3.
note: Aggregate 2026 conservation total reconciles at 336. Exact hunt-code distribution still depends on resolving manual review rows where area/condition maps to multiple hunt codes.
statewide_boundary_rule: Statewide conservation permits use the same boundary concept as the sportsman statewide tag but remain separate conservation permits.
